negative_invariants.description: The #2034 core hole must not regress: -m unit/-m contract must be positively routed by a blocking CI job (the always-on unit-contract-residual job).
The src-side catch-all must be the output-derived any_src/unmatched mechanism (Decision 7b), not a vacuous or negated-mega-glob form.
quarantine-visibility must NOT be in the quality-gate blocking needs set (C-005).
negative_invariants.verification_command: awk '/^  quality-gate:/{f=1} f&&/^  [a-z][a-z0-9_-]*:$/&&!/quality-gate/{f=0} f' .github/workflows/ci-quality.yml | grep -q 'quarantine-visibility' && exit 1 || exit 0

negative_invariants.description: The quality-gate decision step must set shell: bash so the decision-script exit code is NOT swallowed by | tee (gate must be able to fail on GitHub).
The unshim-wave2 dead src globs (src/specify_cli/next, charter_freshness, charter_lint, charter_preflight) must NOT remain in ci-quality.yml (FR-004e).
No negated path mega-glob may implement the catch-all (HiC 7b FORBIDDEN — computed from filter outputs).
